equipBonuses.name: Zealot's Ferocity
equipBonuses.description: When your health is greater than 75%, your Critical Severity is increased by 8,000.

equipBonuses.name: Rising Defense
equipBonuses.description: When hit by a foe you gain 1,000 Defense for 3 seconds. This effect can stack a maximum of 5 times.

equipBonuses.name: Durable Critical
equipBonuses.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Strike, up to a maximum of 6500.

equipBonuses.name: Tit for Tat
equipBonuses.description: Your At-Will and Encounter Powers do 6% more damage, but your Daily Powers do 25% less damage.

equipBonuses.description: +5,000 Outgoing Healing -5,000 Accuracy

equipBonuses.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 6500.

name: Lolthian Vengeance

equipBonuses.name: Artifact Fanatic
equipBonuses.description: When you use an artifact while in combat, you gain 2% Recharge Speed. This effect caps at 20% and ends when you are out of combat or fall in combat.

setBonus: 2 of Set: You gain 2% more Base Damage Boost against Bosses. Your attacks have a 10% chance to deal 100 extra magnitude damage.

equipBonuses.name: Spider's Stride
equipBonuses.description: When you dodge, block, sprint or shadow slip, you do 3% more damage for 15 seconds. This bonus doubles in the Underdark and can only occur once every 20 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Grace
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Forte increases by 7.5% for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Renegade's Courage
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Critical Severity is increased by 5% and Combat Advantage by 2.5%.

equipBonuses.name: Brutish Tactics
equipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, your Combat Advantage is increased by 6%. When your Stamina is under 30%, your Incoming Healing is increased by 6%.

equipBonuses.description: +10% Damage against Beholders.

equipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP, your Incoming Healing is increased by 7%.

equipBonuses.name: Beholder Ward
equipBonuses.description: You take 10% less damage from Beholders.

equipBonuses.name: Tunneled Healer
equipBonuses.description: Your single target heals gain 8% Overall Outgoing Healing.
